case_title: MICHELLE SINGH LAM VS. HIRDAYPAL SINGH DHILLON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, MICHELLE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LAM, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT DHILLON, HIRDAYPAL SINGH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-06-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 IN ORDER TO AMEND HER COMPLAINT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MICHELLE LAM. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HIRDAYPAL SINGH DHILLON. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT NAMES HIRDAYPAL SINGH DHILLON AS DEFENDANT, BUT DOES NOT STATE A CLAIM AGAINST MR. DHILLON. INSTEAD, THE CLAIM READS "DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE COMPANY, AAA, REFUSED TO INVESTIGATE CLAIM." EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-21-2016 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MICHELLE LAM AND DEFENDANT HIRDAYPAL SINGH DHILLON. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AUGUST 29, 2016 IS INVALID. * NOTE, THE ENDORSED FILED COPY THAT THE PLAINTIFF PRESENTED TO THE COURT IS DIFFERENT THAN THE FILED COPY THAT IS SCANNED INTO IJS AND THAT IS IN THE CASE FILE.* JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2016 BY DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MICHELLE LAM. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT HIRDAYPAL SINGH DHILLON. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DHILLON, HIRDAYPAL SINGH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE = $95.00 SERVED AUG-08-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DHILLON, HIRDAYPAL SINGH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAM, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DHILLON, HIRDAYPAL SINGH $9,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,170.00, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 95.00- SERVED JUN-08-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DHILLON, HIRDAYPAL SINGH
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY LAM, MICHELLE DHILLON, HIRDAYPAL SINGH
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LAM, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT DHILLON, HIRDAYPAL SINGH
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOVEMBER 21, 2016 AT 5:30PM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $95.00 SERVED OCT-07-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DHILLON, HIRDAYPAL SINGH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK S. LE. NOT REPORTED (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11-22-16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
